title: BundleSuiteBulkAddRequest
description: Request object for bulk-adding test suites to a bundle. Use mode 'ids' to specify exact suites, or mode 'all' to select all suites with optional exclusions.

selectionModeConfig.title: Selection Mode Config
selectionModeConfig.description: Add a specific set of test suites by their IDs.

ids.description: List of test suite IDs to add.

allModeConfig.title: All
allModeConfig.description: Add all test cases, with an optional list of IDs to exclude.

filter.description: Optional filter to exclude specific test suites from the bulk selection.

excludeIds.description: List of test suite IDs to exclude from the bulk add.

selection.description: Configuration for selecting test suites to add to the bundle. Choose either 'ids' mode to specify exact suites, or 'all' mode to select all suites with optional exclusions.

testSuiteId.description: TestSuite ID where we will be adding the test cases.

mode.description: Mode of bulk addition. 'ids' to specify exact test suite IDs, 'all' to select all suites with optional exclusions.
